subject: feat(dashboard): implement response dashboard with table, detail view, and CSV export
body:
Phase 4 implementation — submission management:
- SubmissionTable: sortable (date, status), filterable (all/new/read/archived),
  paginated (20/page). Shows first 3 field values as summary columns.
  Inline status change actions (mark read, archive).
- SubmissionDetail: slide-over panel showing all field values for a response.
  Status management actions. Metadata display (submission time, time to complete).
- CSV export: client-side generation with proper escaping, downloads as file.
  Includes all submittable fields plus timestamp and status.
- ResponsesPage: loads submissions from API with dev fallback to sample data.
  Optimistic status updates. Split layout: table + optional detail panel.

Tags: dashboard, submissions, csv, responses
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: form-builder
Semver: minor
